global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with food icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Quick dinner delivery service with a promotional offer.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Three food icons
elements.description: Three rectangular food icons with a glossy finish, arranged horizontally in the center.

elements.label: Three food icons
elements.description: Another rectangular food icon with a glossy finish, positioned next to the previous icons.

elements.label: Three food icons
elements.description: A third rectangular food icon with a glossy finish, completing the trio in the center.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A small rectangular button with rounded edges, featuring the text 'Claim reward' in a bold font.

elements.label: Small food icon
elements.description: A small circular food icon with a glossy finish, positioned below the main icons.

elements.label: Dinner promotion text
elements.description: Bold black text stating 'Dinner in minutes' with additional smaller text below it, all centered at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Free delivery over $15 €29.99 Claim reward

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: The logo 'CraveLoop' in a bold font, positioned at the top of the ad.
